subject: WM-0170 blocked
body: Independent B1 review proved that WM-0177 repaired ordinary WorkOffer/path/reservation/ability owners but not the architecture-required food/rest/medical exact indexes: their selection/read APIs still materialize results and cannot provide same-call owner/row/index/backlog/caregiver-basis revalidation. Systems-architect selected strict prerequisite WM-0181 and rejected derived WorkOffer mirroring. Preserve the Phase A/B1 non-complete checkpoint; do not resume coordinator implementation until WM-0181 is verified, integrated and done and the exact resume procedure passes.
